KmaApiHubStructuredOutput.description: Normalized output from one KMA APIHub structured operation.
KmaApiHubStructuredOutput.title: KmaApiHubStructuredOutput

data_type.description: Response format requested from KMA APIHub. XML is the official sample/default; JSON may be used only when the operation supports it. Official parameter name: dataType. Operation: EqkInfoService/getEqkMsgList.
data_type.title: Data Type

from_tm_fc.description: Earthquake/volcano bulletin announcement start date, YYYYMMDD. Use a recent KST date; APIHub returns an error for ranges outside the current 3 days window. Official parameter name: fromTmFc. Operation: EqkInfoService/getEqkMsgList.
from_tm_fc.title: From Tm Fc

num_of_rows.description: Number of rows to return. Use the default unless more rows are needed. Official parameter name: numOfRows. Operation: EqkInfoService/getEqkMsgList.
num_of_rows.title: Num Of Rows

page_no.description: Page number, 1-based. Use the default unless the citizen asks for another page. Official parameter name: pageNo. Operation: EqkInfoService/getEqkMsgList.
page_no.title: Page No

to_tm_fc.description: Earthquake/volcano bulletin announcement end date, YYYYMMDD. Keep the range within the current 3 days window and do not use stale catalog sample dates. Official parameter name: toTmFc. Operation: EqkInfoService/getEqkMsgList.
to_tm_fc.title: To Tm Fc
